name: Takaya Satou
description: __Height:__ 162cm (5'3") First year law student. Totally fascinated by two-dimensional girls, he is awkward around three-dimensional (aka real) girls. He has gone so far as to invent his own ideal girl, a two-dimensional creation of his imagination known to him as VJ (Brigitte Jeomillia).

name: Teito Klein
description: __Height:__ 156 cm The prince of the now-ruined Raggs kingdom and the owner of the Eye of Michael, Teito was enslaved for 10 years until his best friend Mikage helped him escape the imperial military academy. Having slowly started to retrieve his sealed memories, Teito makes it his goal to uncover the truth behind the Raggs War and his own past. As a first step towards this goal, he aims to become a bishop of the Barsburg Church, an institution helping people in need and protecting them from Kor

name: Tooru Mutou
description: Natsuno's best friend. He has a slight crush on the nurse, Ritsuko. ~!He dies in episode 5 after being bitten by Shimizu Megumi and resurrects as a shiki. He is then forced to turn Natsuno into a shiki against both of their wills. When Natsuno comes back as a Shiki, Tohru begs for his forgiveness, and although he doesn't tell anyone about Natsuno, he remains at Sunako's side, doing everything to survive, even knowing that Natsuno is their enemy, slowly distancing himself from his best friend. Wh

name: You Kasukabe
description: A good-natured, quiet young girl who has the ability to speak to animals and use the abilities of any animal she's able to befriend. She is often accompanied by a calico cat. Her gift is called "Genome Arbor - Non Priorum". She came to Little Garden mostly due wanting more friends. In addition, she only gets angry when her friends are threatened, and is a big eater despite her appearance.

name: Yuma Okazaki
description: Yuma is in her second year of high school with her childhood and best friend Hotaru. She is in a relationship with Takeda, but she's very inexperienced as he's her first boyfriend and often times asks Hotaru for advice but gets unexpected responses instead.

name: Aki Mikage
description: A member of the equestrian club, she loves horses and grew up on a farm. She is expected to eventually take over the family farm, however she remains uncertain if that is what she herself wishes to do.

name: Anti
description: A sentient kaiju created by Akane that is able to copy his opponent's abilities. Anti displays an irrational hatred for the Hyper Agent in both his human and kaiju forms. His hatred is so great, Anti will even attack a fellow kaiju if they stand between him and Gridman. ~!During the tenth episode, Anti's obsession with defeating Gridman evolved into a desire to protect him. This, combined with Anti's own copy ability, transformed Anti's kaiju form into a Gridman-like form dubbed Gridknight!~

name: Atsuko Chiba
description: Chiba Atsuko is the head of the DC Mini development team. She also uses the DC Mini to treat patients by entering their dreams as her alter ego Paprika. She does this in secret since the system is still under development, and such unauthorized treatments are illegal. ~!She is in love with Tokita.!~

name: Chiquita
description: Kasper's ruthless head of security and Lehm's ex-wife. Both Chiquita and Lehm used to serve as Floyd Hekmatyar's bodyguards. She can be considered the best bodyguard in HCLI.

name: Chiwa Harusaki
description: __Height:__ 150 cm (4' 9") Eita's childhood friend and neighbour who is in love with him, and a 1st year Highschool student. Her friends often call her 'chihuahua' (Chiwawa), due to her petite appearance and two ponytails that resemble puppy's ears. She used to be in Kendo Club until the last year of junior highschool due to a critical injury. She is tomboy, who loves eating and meat, as she thinks about food from dawn till dusk. She want's to be popular with males, and constantly fights Masuzu

name: Haruo Yano
description: A child at the orphanage who spends a lot of his time in the old Nissan Sunny 1200, where he fantasizes about many adventures in the car as an escape from the real world. He states he feels smothered by the other children at the orphanage and enjoys time by himself. People outside of the orphanage often refer to him as White because of his hair colour.

name: Imouto
description: A mysterious girl. She is quiet, with little self-assertion. She tends to hide behind her [brother](https://anilist.co/character/188625/Kuroneko).

name: Ivo Robotnik
description: __Height:__ 6'1" __Weight:__ 282.2 lbs __Occupation:__ Self-proclaimed genius scientist Robotnik is the villain of the Sonic universe in most games, a genius scientist with an IQ of 300. He is always attempting to destroy parts of the world to make it home to his super-city so he can then attain world domination, only to be stopped by [Sonic](https://anilist.co/character/2882) and his friends every time. On two occasions he has used a scientific experiment and an ancient monster to achieve his p

name: Jin Kanzaki
description: The main protagonist. A mysterious young man bearing a circular lump on the back of his left hand, Jin was a result of the Z.E.T. Project by the Amagi Corporation to create the perfect being to fight and destroy the escaped Players. Jin is able to transform a creature known as "ZET", a mutant possessing superhuman abilities, but often mistaken for another Player. The transformation is slow, though it may be accelerated due to extreme rage and conditions.The source of his strength appears to be t

name: Junko Hattori
description: Junko is introduced in episode one of the anime. She's very skilled with a short blade and wooden sword, both of which she carries or summons. She also has a tsundere nature, often becoming embarrassed and misunderstanding situations because of that. She comes from a Suharaist family that protects the Empire and is very strict about upholding the values that were taught to her. ~!She wants to marry Sai Akuto and even temporarily removed herself from her family to aid Sai when he was in trouble,

name: Kanji  Koganegawa
description: __Height:__ 191.5 cm __Team:__ Datekougyou High School __Year:__ 1st year __Number:__ 7 __Position:__ Setter Koganegawa is a first year setter at Date Tech High. He is very energetic and enthusiastic but often lacks the ability to think carefully about his actions. Despite being rather simple-minded, he's also shown to be determined to improve his abilities and support his team as their setter and with his height but tends to focus on improving the wrong areas.

name: Kano Sazanami
description: A high school student who lives alone. She wears ninja-style attire as her Magical Girl outfit. Her ability allows her to never miss a shot with her shurikens. ~!She lives through the events of the exam as a result of killing both Swim Swim and Fav, but loses both her left eye and arm.!~

name: Katalina Alize
description: Once a devoted knight of the Erste Empire in charge of guarding Lyria, Katalina turns on her former home and vows to travel with Gran to protect Lyria from the Empire's schemes. Her skilled and calculated displays of swordplay with her trusted sword Rukalsa are in stark contrast to her profoundly lacking sense of direction and poor cooking skills. These things, among others, are regularly pointed out by her fellow party members.

name: Katsuya Honda
description: He is Tohru's late father and used to be a student teacher when he met Kyoko Honda (who he helped leave her previous lifestyle). He later left student teaching and married Kyoko, despite the eight-year age gap (when he and Kyoko met, she was 13 and he was 21). Katsuya, who had apparently had a rebellious childhood, admitted that he had fallen in love with Kyoko because she had been able to cry and confess to being lonely, which he wasn't able to do. When Kyoko told him she was pregnant and had d

name: Koala
description: Koala was a soldier under Meleoron's command, but disapproved of Meleoron's pacifist attitude. He generally does not take part in the war between the Hunters and Chimera Ants. After Meleoron has gone individual, he is presumably free from any duty.
